instructions: Open Chrome with the public variant loaded from the approved staging folder.
Capture the extension loaded state from chrome://extensions.
Capture the sidepanel connected state after verifying the local bridge connection indicator.
Capture runtime or service worker DevTools evidence showing the expected disabled runtime posture.
Capture permission warning screen if Chrome displays one during load or review.
Redact local usernames, tokens, hostnames, tabs, bookmarks, file paths and secrets before committing evidence.
